buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-border-default text-primary hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-primary transition-colors font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-white border border-border-default rounded-xl shadow-xs hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.default: w-full border border-border-default rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-accent transition-all bg-white text-primary

tables.container: w-full border-collapse border-b border-border-default bg-white rounded-lg overflow-hidden
tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-border-default text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider text-left py-3 px-4

sidebar.container: w-64 bg-slate-50 border-r border-border-default h-screen flex flex-col
sidebar.link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-primary transition-colors
sidebar.link_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-white border border-border-default text-primary shadow-xs

rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Suffix inputs with '-input', buttons with '-button', forms with '-form'.
Sidebar navigation links should have specific test IDs (e.g., 'nav-dashboard-link', 'nav-schedule-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'IBM Plex Sans' font links to `index.html`.
Ensure all `.js` component files are updated with the `data-testid` attributes.
Do NOT replace existing remote image placeholders or specific remote images used.
Refactor layout for better alignment, specifically focusing on the Dashboard grids, Table padding, and Form clarity.
Use Shadcn UI where applicable, customizing the base styles to match the crisp borders and high-contrast text defined in the color palette.
Upgrade all headings from default fonts to Cabinet Grotesk, ensuring adequate spacing below headings.
Do NOT generate new images, use only the current images.
Fix any unclosed tags or syntax issues encountered during the cleanup.
Convert scattered state or messy prop drilling to clean UI context if it aids testability or structure.

image_urls.note: Per instructions, KEEP CURRENT REMOTE IMAGES. No new image URLs generated.
